metadata.name: Split an Order for Partial Shipment

description: An order contains two items, but one is on backorder. The customer wants the in-stock item to ship now.

nodes.task_description: Find the order and confirm one item is in stock and the other is on backorder.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the inventory status of the line items.

nodes.task_description: Split the order line for the in-stock item into a new sales order.

expected_outcome.expected: A new order is created for the available item, and the original order is updated to only contain the backordered item.

nodes.task_description: Release the new order to the warehouse for immediate shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: The new order is sent to the WMS for fulfillment.
